content: This rule describe meta information of generic data type generation pattern.
Field Identity triggering definition of Identity of <EntityName>
Field Enumerated string triggering definition of EnumeratedString of <EntityName>+<FieldName>
Entity can be generated by list of field definition

By default, generated entity also automatically has following field: CreatedAt time.Time, with default value : now in construction time
- UpdatedAt time.Time, with default value : now in construction time
- DeletedAt time.Time, with default value : nil
- IsDeleted bool, with default value : false
All fields are generated with JSON tags in snake_case by default.
Fields marked with the 'secret' tag are not marshaled to JSON.
Entity Definition also generates constructor with field with constructor input tags as args
Automatic fields are set in the constructor automatically and are not passed as constructor parameters
Developers can override automatic fields by explicitly defining them in the field list (e.g., if different default values or field names are needed)
Note: Validation is handled in the presentation layer (DTOs) using github.com/go-playground/validator. Domain entities focus purely on business logic without presentation concerns.
